kinesisfirehose.deliverystream.copycomma.Docs: Parameters to use with the Amazon Redshift `COPY` command. For examples, see the `CopyOptions` content for the [CopyCommand](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/firehose/latest/APIReference/API_CopyCommand.html) data type in the *Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose API Reference*.
A comma-separated list of column names.
The name of the target table. The table must already exist in the database.
